req.title: Recurring transfer
req.statement: A premium-tier customer shall be able to schedule a recurring transfer up to $10,000 per occurrence; non-premium accounts capped at $2,500.

tests.name: naive_case

doc._raw_response:
```python
"""
Pytest tests for recurring transfer scheduling limits based on customer tier.

Requirement: A premium-tier customer shall be able to schedule a recurring
transfer up to $10,000 per occurrence; non-premium accounts capped at $2,500.
"""

import pytest
from decimal import Decimal
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Assumed production code interface (adjust imports to match your codebase)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# from banking.transfers import schedule_recurring_transfer
# from banking.models import Account, TransferRequest
# from banking.exceptions import TransferLimitExceededError, InvalidTransferError
#
# For demonstration the classes are inlined so the test file is self-contained.
# Replace the block below with real imports once the production module exists.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class TransferLimitExceededError(Exception):
    """Raised when a transfer amount exceeds the account-tier limit."""
    pass


class InvalidTransferError(Exception):
    """Raised for structurally invalid transfer requests (e.g. negative amount)."""
    pass


class Account:
    PREMIUM = "premium"
    STANDARD = "standard"

    TRANSFER_LIMITS = {
        PREMIUM: Decimal("10000.00"),
        STANDARD: Decimal("2500.00"),
    }

    def __init__(self, account_id: str, tier: str):
        if tier not in (self.PREMIUM, self.STANDARD):
            raise ValueError(f"Unknown tier: {tier}")
        self.account_id = account_id
        self.tier = tier

    @property
    def transfer_limit(self) -> Decimal:
        return self.TRANSFER_LIMITS[self.tier]

    @property
    def is_premium(self) -> bool:
        return self.tier == self.PREMIUM
